queries.q: Write release notes for version 4.2: we shipped dark mode, faster search, and fixed the export bug
Turn this changelog of merged PRs into something customers will actually want to read
We're shipping the spring update on Friday; draft the what's-new announcement for the in-app banner and email
Prepare the app store update description for the new iOS build
Support and sales keep getting surprised by what we ship; write the customer-facing summary of this release for them
Translate these engineering ticket titles into benefit-focused notes users can understand for the monthly product update
Draft release notes for the Q2 platform update, highlighting the three biggest features
Our users have no idea we fixed the sync issue they kept complaining about; announce this release in a way that rebuilds trust
Write the customer email announcing the new integrations we shipped this sprint
Summarize this release for customers: new SSO support, two performance improvements, five bug fixes, all in user-benefit language
The release is in two weeks; build the checklist that makes sure marketing, support, and legal are ready for it
queries.notes: Coordinating launch readiness, not communicating the ship, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Send leadership the weekly progress update on the migration project; nothing has shipped yet
queries.notes: Progress update to internal stakeholders, not an announcement of shipped changes

queries.q: Generate a technical changelog from these commit messages for the developer docs
queries.notes: Engineering-facing record; the skill's boundary keeps the changelog separate

queries.q: Write user stories for the notification preferences feature
Nothing user-visible shipped this cycle, it was all refactoring; write a retrospective on the refactor work instead
queries.notes: The skill's own boundary says skip the cycle when nothing user-visible shipped

queries.q: Draft the PRD for the upcoming billing revamp
Fix this TypeError in my React component when the props are undefined
Write a SQL query to count weekly active users by cohort
What restaurants should I book for a client dinner in Chicago?
Create a competitive analysis of the top three release-management tools
queries.notes: Contains 'release' but is a discover-phase research ask
